turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, hello. Mujhe pulmonologist se milna hai, mujhe khansi 3 hafte se hai, antibiotics se kuch farak nahin pada.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Mr. Thakur, hamare pulmonologist Dr. Kedar Bhide hain. Unka slot parso yani mangalwar ko shaam 5 baje aur shukravaar subah 11 baje hai. Kaunsa theek rahega?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Confirm ho gaya. Mr. Omkar Thakur, Dr. Bhide ke saath mangalvaar shaam 5 baje. Agar pehle koi X-ray ya CT scan karaya ho toh wo bhi saath leke aayein.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, chest X-ray hai mere paas. Lekar aaunga.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bahut achha. Jaldi theek ho jaayein!
